Chelsio Communications unveils Unified Storage Server (USS) with high networking speeds at World Summit AI MENA.
news.summary: Transforming storage management by introducing cutting-edge technology for improved performance, user-friendliness, and scalability is Chelsio Communications, Inc. The company, headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, has established itself as a top provider of high-speed Ethernet Unified Wire Adapters and Application-Specific Integrated Circuits (ASICs) for storage solutions. Offering a wide range of options with speeds ranging from 1Gb to 400Gb, Chelsio aims to meet diverse storage needs effectively.

news.headline: Mori Memorial Foundation releases GPCI 2024 report for 48 major cities, includes 'GPCI–Financial Centers' index for the 2nd time.
news.summary: In Tokyo, the Mori Memorial Foundation’s Institute for Urban Strategies, founded by Mori Building, a prominent developer, unveiled the Global Power City Index (GPCI) 2024 report evaluating the competitiveness of 48 global cities. A new addition to the report is the 'GPCI–Financial Centers' index, emphasizing initiatives cities are taking to bolster their global financial standing. This index complements the main report, providing a comprehensive overview of each city's strengths. The GPCI serves as a significant tool for analyzing urban performance and international status in the modern era.

news.headline: China's Imports Increase by 2.4% Year on Year in Yuan Terms from Jan-Nov
China's January to November Exports Rise 5.4% Year on Year in USD Terms
China's January to November exports rose by 6.7% year on year in yuan terms according to CCTV.
Economist Peter Schiff urges Biden to sell US-owned Bitcoin to reduce budget deficit before term ends.
news.summary: Prominent economist Peter Schiff recommended that President Joe Biden sell all of the U.S.-owned Bitcoin to alleviate the country’s growing budget deficit. Schiff advised Biden through a social media post, suggesting it as a positive action before the transition to a potential Donald Trump presidency. He stated that selling the Bitcoin would not only aid in reducing the 2024 budget deficit but also eliminate discussions about creating a controversial "strategic" Bitcoin Reserve. This recommendation has garnered attention as a potential financial strategy during the transitional period.

TransAlta Corp (TSX: TA, NYSE: TAC) declares $0.06 quarterly dividend per common share, payable on April 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on December 9, 2024, the Board of Directors of TransAlta Corporation (TSX: TA) (NYSE: TAC) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid out on April 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2025.

news.headline: Redbrick Connect 2024 global creator festival in Seoul showcases innovative game projects, wraps up on Nov 30 at COEX.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Seoul, South Korea, the Redbrick Connect 2024 global creator festival came to a successful close. Hosted by Redbrick, a cloud-based game creation platform, the event took place at COEX in Samseong-dong and featured a display of creative and innovative game projects. The festival concluded on November 30, with a significant turnout of attendees and participants.

news.headline: New quantum chip by Google raises concerns about crypto encryption? Expert believes it's not a threat yet.
news.summary: According to one expert, despite being a significant development, Willow currently does not pose a threat to crypto encryption.

news.headline: Nona Biosciences and Kodiak Sciences join forces for advanced antibody therapies in ophthalmic diseases.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on December 9, 2024, Nona Biosciences, a worldwide biotech firm, revealed its partnership with Kodiak. Nona Biosciences offers a comprehensive "Idea to IND" solution, spanning target validation, antibody discovery, and preclinical research.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin bounce back after flash crash. BTC at $97,790.92, -1.86%. ETH at $3,765.62, -5.05%. DOGE at $0.4164, -9.34%. $1.72B in liquidations, $1.55B longs, $509M short positions at risk. BTC OI -1.32%, ETH OI -5.44%. Long positions surge.
news.summary: Bitcoin experienced a sharp drop, falling from $98,000 to a low of $94,355, triggering $1.72 billion in liquidations and $509 million at risk of liquidation if it surpassed $100,000. Ethereum also dipped to $3,550 before rebounding to $3,765. The crash led to a 1.32% decline in Bitcoin's Open Interest and a 5.44% decrease in Ethereum's unsettled futures contracts. Long positions for Bitcoin increased, suggesting optimism for future price rises. Key numbers include Bitcoin's price of $97,790.92 (-1.86%), Ethereum at $3,765.62 (-5.05%), and Dogecoin at $0.4164 (-9.34%).

news.headline: Metagenomi presents preclinical data at ASH showing sustained Factor VIII activity in NHP study for over 16 months.
news.summary: After more than sixteen months of follow-up in a nonhuman primate study, significant levels of Factor VIII (FVIII) activity were consistently maintained at therapeutically relevant levels. This suggests promising long-term efficacy of the treatment.

news.headline: GOL files Chapter 11 plan with U.S. Bankruptcy Court, aims for timely completion; important for restructuring.
news.summary: Submission of permits enables the company to maintain progress towards meeting restructuring deadlines. GOL Linhas Aéreas Inteligentes S.A. (B3: GOLL4) recently filed necessary permits, aiding in the timely completion of their restructuring process. The company, a key player in Brazil's airline industry, partnered with Abra Group Limited for this initiative. This update was announced on Dec. 9, 2024 in São Paulo.

news.headline: IASO Bio shared study findings on CAR T-Cell impact on outcomes in Multiple Myeloma at 2024 ASH conference.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, IASO Biotherapeutics ("IASO Bio"), a biopharmaceutical company operating in Shanghai and Nanjing, China, as well as San Jose, California, disclosed key research results. The company specializes in creating and bringing to market groundbreaking cell therapies and biologics.

news.headline: Global regenerative agriculture market to hit $16.8 billion by 2027; driven by consumer demand, corporate investment, govt support, and tech advancements.
news.summary: The global regenerative agriculture market is expected to reach $16.8 billion by 2027, growing at a CAGR of 14.0%. This sector, valued at $8.7 billion in 2022, is gaining traction due to concerns about the environmental impact of conventional farming. Key drivers of market growth include consumer demand for sustainable food, corporate investments, government policies, technological advancements, and increased collaboration. Regenerative agriculture offers businesses a way to meet demand for sustainable food production systems, with a focus on soil health and environmental preservation. Opportunities lie in biologicals and carbon sequestration, with microbial-based products showing promise for improving soil health and capturing carbon.

news.headline: Lyell Immunopharma presents positive data from Phase 1-2 trial of IMPT-314 for B-cell lymphoma at 2024 ASH Annual Meeting. #CAR-T #LYEL #ASH2024
news.summary: Lyell Immunopharma, Inc., headquartered in South San Francisco, shared promising clinical results at the 66th American Society of Hematology (ASH) Annual Meeting on Dec 09, 2024. The company, listed as Nasdaq: LYEL, specializes in developing next-gen CAR T-cell therapies for solid tumors and hematologic malignancies. Initial positive data from the Phase 1-2 study of IMPT-314 was unveiled. IMPT-314, an autologous dual-targeting CD19/CD20 CAR T-cell product candidate, is designed for those with large B-cell lymphoma. This multi-center trial showed encouraging outcomes for patients with aggressive B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma.

news.headline: Block Green partners with Meanwhile for Bitcoin facility, backed by Peter Thiel's Founders Fund and Sam Altman.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Zurich, it was reported that Block Green, a prominent Bitcoin investment platform supported by Peter Thiel's Founders Fund, revealed a strategic collaboration with Meanwhile, a trailblazer in Bitcoin-based life insurance products endorsed by Sam Altman. This partnership entails Meanwhile providing their services to Block Green's clientele.

Singapore's Kepler Search wins award for success in Japan's data center talent market, recognized by W.Media.
news.summary: A boutique search agency, Kepler Search, headquartered in Singapore, was recently acknowledged by W.Media, the largest publisher in Asia's data center and cloud industry. The agency was commended for its accomplishments in effectively maneuvering through the tough talent markets in Northeast Asia. The recognition highlights Kepler Search's proficiency in recruiting top talent in the region. This recognition comes amidst a surge in demand for skilled professionals in the sector.

Hydro One Inc., Ontario's largest electricity company, prices $750 million medium term notes under sustainable financing framework.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 9, 2024, Hydro One Limited, the largest electricity transmission and distribution company in Ontario, revealed that their subsidiary Hydro One Inc. had set the price for an offering of $750 million of Medium...
